ab: a daman i, marenang mi kan mulri na babayan muka i iciba kana naniwanan meniwana. kemasu dra sadru dratu sinaleman na kulakulang i mulri na babayan. aw semanga driya dratu aekanan dra Inanuwayan a sasepadan dra trau.
ch: 昨天我跟奶奶去市集擺攤，奶奶帶了許多自己種的蔬菜去，也製作了原住民美食給大家。
en: Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

ab: sagar a trau peniya dratu naniwanan kan mulri na babayan. kadruwan a trau tremima dra kamangulr aw dra tipatipayan. aw kadruwan a trau druwa temalrama dratu inabel na irupan.
ch: 大家很喜歡奶奶的攤位，辣椒和野莧很多人買，許多人來品嘗她煮的菜餚。
en: Everyone loved my grandmother’s stall. Many people bought the chilis and Slender Amaranth, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

ab: tu sinangaan na binariyaw aw na bineraberas kan mulri na babayan i, salaw imaran. ulraya driya na terekuk na niringering dratu tralun kana kisiw. tu arelr kana aekanan i, kemedrekedreng dra kadruwan dra labang druwa muturika kaniyam naniwanan.
ch: 奶奶做的包葉粿和糯米飯非常好吃，還有用養生草炒的雞肉，美食的味道吸引了很多客人來我們攤位排隊。
en: The Bamboo leaf migao and sticky rice she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.

ab: an demaderu dra aekanan i mulri na babayan i, kadru ku i saninin kiyatrebung dra labang. merukedrang ku patrirebeng dra, “na kulakulang i, naniyam sinaleman peniya. adri pinuka dra puwatremel. alamu! kamelamu trima a!”
ch: 奶奶煮東西的時候，我在旁邊招攬客人。我在一旁大喊著：「蔬菜都是自己種的，天然有機，趕快來買喔!」
en: While my grandmother was cooking, I was on the side attracting customers. I shouted, \"The vegetables are self-grown, all-natural and organic! Come and buy now!\"

ab: garemaremay i, niwananay lra peniya na manay driya. “amau nu pinulrangan a!” kema i mulri na babayan kanku.
ch: 我們的東西很快就賣完了，奶奶說：「都是因為有你的幫忙。」
en: Our goods sold out quickly, and my grandmother said, \"It’s all thanks to your help.\"

ab: idri na lremak na meniwan i, mukalradram ku lra dratu semaseberan dra Inanuwayan aw dra kasaiguwan dratu aekanan dra Inanuwayan. aw mitinalraman ku lra dratu ulepan kana naniwanan meniwan.
ch: 這個活動，我學到了有關原住民植物和食品的知識，並且體驗到了擺攤的辛苦。
en: Through this event, I learned about indigenous plants and food and experienced the hard work of running a stall.

ab: menau ku kan mulri na babayan dratu lubisan kana aekanan na bulretrenganan. salaw ku semangal aw maruwa ku pailring dra trau.
ch: 看到了奶奶對傳統食物的熱愛，我感到非常驕傲和榮幸。
en: Seeing my grandmother’s passion for traditional food, I feel very proud and honored.
